business_description.nature_of_business: Construction contracting operations with payroll classifications for carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, interior painting, project managers/superintendents, and clerical office employees.

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number WC-KCB-2025-5580; policy period 2025-08-01 to 2026-08-01; final experience modification factor 0.86.

positives: Interstate rating is No; rating state is PA.
concerns: Actual loss data shows 20 claims over three policy years.
Total incurred losses for the three policy years total 546731.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Policy years 2021-2022 through 2023-2024 show 20 total claims with total incurred losses of 546731, including actual primary losses of 335671 and actual excess losses of 211060.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: PCRB Experience Rating Worksheet for Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. Policy Number WC-KCB-2025-5580. Valuation Date 2026-03-15. Final Experience Modification Factor 0.86.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Payroll/classification data includes PA class codes 5403 Carpentry — NOC, 5190 Electrical Wiring, 5183 Plumbing — NOC, 5022 Masonry — NOC, 5474 Painting — Interior, 5606 Contractors — Project Manager, Superintendent, and 8810 Clerical Office Employees — NOC.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Actual loss data: 2023-2024 had 7 claims with total paid and incurred of 190770, primary losses of 120455, and excess losses of 70315. 2022-2023 had 3 claims with total paid and incurred of 115267, primary losses of 58500, and excess losses of 56767. 2021-2022 had 10 claims with total paid and incurred of 240694, primary losses of 156716, and excess losses of 83978.
